category_sources: Official Black documentation describes Black as an opinionated formatter.
source_facts.description says Black is a Python code formatter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is black; official docs and psf/black use Black as display name.
docs_sources: Official psf/black README links users to Read the Docs for documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official stable Black documentation on Read the Docs.
repo_sources: Official psf/black GitHub repository is the Black project repository.
tags_sources: Official psf/black repository topics include formatter, codeformatter, Python, and pre-commit hook.
source_facts.description and current_curation.tags identify a Python formatter CLI.
